channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gavin Newsom Claims Credit for a New Beach After Finding a Single Grain of Sand
item.description: The governor asserts the state is laying track it has not yet purchased.

item.title: SCOTUS Execution Case Highlights the Thomas-Alito Dream Team at Its Best
item.description: Thomas sets the direction for the Court on an issue, while Alito takes a more moderate stance to gradually achieve that goal.

item.title: An Autopsy as Malpractice
item.description: The DNC autopsy is a weak, unfinished document that reveals more about the Democratic Party's decline than its analysis suggests.

item.title: Trump Urges New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh to Be 'Totally Independent,' Only Don't Stifle Growth
item.description: President Trump told Kevin Warsh to be "totally independent" as he was sworn in as Fed chairman before a gathering of Washington elites.
